title: WireMe
description:
`GET /v1/workspaces/{ws}/me` response — the caller's own membership describe: who you are here,
who added you, and the workspace's address block. Member-scoped (the uniform not-found otherwise).

address.description: The workspace's full address (the share link — server-built on the public link base).

invited_by.description: Who invited this principal (absent for a genesis owner).
